'''volabaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:ateleological|ateleological]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-l-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ateleological|ateleological]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| volabaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:volabithi|volabithi]] || [[word:volabiji|volabiji]] || [[word:volabishi|volabishi]] || [[word:volabiki|volabiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:volabuthuthu|volabuthuthu]] || [[word:volabujuju|volabujuju]] || [[word:volabushushu|volabushushu]] || [[word:volabukuku|volabukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:volabuthu|volabuthu]] || [[word:volabuju|volabuju]] || [[word:volabushu|volabushu]] || [[word:volabuku|volabuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:volabufthuf|volabufthuf]] || [[word:volabufjuf|volabufjuf]] || [[word:volabufshuf|volabufshuf]] || [[word:volabufkuf|volabufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:volabethe|volabethe]] || [[word:volabeje|volabeje]] || [[word:volabeshe|volabeshe]] || [[word:volabeke|volabeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:volabothotho|volabothotho]] || [[word:volabojojo|volabojojo]] || [[word:volaboshosho|volaboshosho]] || [[word:volabokoko|volabokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:volabotho|volabotho]] || [[word:volabojo|volabojo]] || [[word:volabosho|volabosho]] || [[word:volaboko|volaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:volabofthof|volabofthof]] || [[word:volabofjof|volabofjof]] || [[word:volabofshof|volabofshof]] || [[word:volabofkof|volabofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:volabÃŸfthÃŸf|volabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfjÃŸf|volabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfshÃŸf|volabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfkÃŸf|volabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:volabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|volabÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|volabÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|volabÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|volabÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:volabÃŸfthÃŸf|volabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfjÃŸf|volabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfshÃŸf|volabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfkÃŸf|volabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:volabÃŸfthÃŸf|volabÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfjÃŸf|volabÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfshÃŸf|volabÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:volabÃŸfkÃŸf|volabÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:volabÃḊthÃḊ|volabÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:volabÃḊjÃḊ|volabÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:volabÃḊshÃḊ|volabÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:volabÃḊkÃḊ|volabÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:volabathatha|volabathatha]] || [[word:volabajaja|volabajaja]] || [[word:volabashasha|volabashasha]] || [[word:volabakaka|volabakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:volabatha|volabatha]] || [[word:volabaja|volabaja]] || [[word:volabasha|volabasha]] || [[word:volabaka|volabaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:volabafthaf|volabafthaf]] || [[word:volabafjaf|volabafjaf]] || [[word:volabafshaf|volabafshaf]] || [[word:volabafkaf|volabafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:volabasha|volabasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:volabshÃḋsha|volabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:volabrosha|volabrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:volabmusha|volabmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:volabyasha|volabyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govolabnkshÃḋsha|govolabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govolabnkrosha|govolabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govolabnkmusha|govolabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govolabnkyasha|govolabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:volalabasha|volalabasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:volalabshÃḋsha|volalabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:volalabrosha|volalabrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:volalabmusha|volalabmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:volalabyasha|volalabyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govolalabnkshÃḋsha|govolalabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govolalabnkrosha|govolalabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govolalabnkmusha|govolalabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govolalabnkyasha|govolalabnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:velÃḊbasha|velÃḊbasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:velÃḊbshÃḋsha|velÃḊbshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:velÃḊbrosha|velÃḊbrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:velÃḊbmusha|velÃḊbmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:velÃḊbyasha|velÃḊbyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govelÃḊbnkshÃḋsha|govelÃḊbnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govelÃḊbnkrosha|govelÃḊbnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govelÃḊbnkmusha|govelÃḊbnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govelÃḊbnkyasha|govelÃḊbnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:volfabasha|volfabasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:volfabshÃḋsha|volfabshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:volfabrosha|volfabrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:volfabmusha|volfabmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:volfabyasha|volfabyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govolfabnkshÃḋsha|govolfabnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govolfabnkrosha|govolfabnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govolfabnkmusha|govolfabnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:govolfabnkyasha|govolfabnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
